name: test-debt-in-prism
summary: Add conditional Stage 5.5 to /prism — test-debt-classifier subagent runs project test suite (pytest or bash test.sh in v1), classifies failures into 5 categories, feeds into Stage 6 Synthesis. Includes new prism-bash-allowlist.sh hook as scope guardrail (not security boundary) for the classifier agent.

changes.desc: 5-category classifier subagent (Bash+Read+Glob+Grep), 2K-token output cap, per-runner exit-code table, multi-class tiebreak, zero-failures behavior, timeout-parameter required, partial-output-on-timeout, textual false-pass scan
PreToolUse Bash hook; substring-prefix allowlist match for test-debt-classifier agent_type; scope-guardrail framing; fail-open
Add Stage 5.5 wiring (runner detection, hook-wiring self-probe AC23, stale-state detection AC24, opt-out gate, subagent dispatch, Synthesis integration, wizard state schema, Security subsection)
Add prism-bash-allowlist.sh to PreToolUse Bash matcher
Detect existing user settings.json missing the new hook entry; print loud warning with JSON snippet to merge
Hook count update (20→21 shell files; 19→20 hooks)
Hook count update (19→21 shell files; 18→20 hooks — catches stale baseline + adds new)
Cat 3-8 cover new files + behavioral evals (AC1, AC11, AC15-AC22)
Add 7 fixtures for hook behavior + classification edge cases
100 synthetic failing tests + generate.sh — used to verify subagent return-message ≤2K-token bound

preserve: All 6 lens agents remain read-only (Read/Glob/Grep only)
All 6 reviewer agents declare Bash but do not actively use it (effectively read-only by prompt discipline)
Other PreToolUse hooks (secret-scanner, protect-claude-md, etc.) continue to fire
Main-session Bash calls behave exactly as today (new hook is no-op when agent_type absent or non-matching)
Synthesis backward compat: test-debt findings ADD to inputs, do NOT replace existing finding shapes
bash test.sh continues to pass on this repo with new files in place
Hook ≤100ms no-op fast path; ≤500ms enforcement path
Subagent return-message ≤2K tokens regardless of test suite size
success_criteria: AC1: Install dry run produces expected file layout w/ valid syntax/JSON
AC2-AC5: Hook block/allow/no-op behaviors per agent_type
AC6-AC7: Runner detection for pytest + bash test.sh
AC8-AC9: Skip behavior for no_runner_detected + opt_out_env_var
AC10: Ambient PreToolUse fires for subagents (verified 2026-05-01 via prior-art)
AC11: Subagent return ≤2K tokens (1500-word proxy via WU13 fixture)
AC12-AC13: bash test.sh still passes; dangerous-commands.sh byte-identical
AC14: Stage 5.5 raw output persisted to wizard log
AC15: pytest exit codes (rc=1/2/3/4/5) handled per spec
AC17: False-pass detection (rc=0 + failure markers) → test-infrastructure-broken
AC18: Skip-reason synthesis messages render specific message per closed enum value
AC19: Multi-class tiebreak (highest severity wins, secondary in reasoning)
AC20: Zero-failures → findings:[] + status:complete + no synthesis contribution
AC21: Migration forward-compat (absent test_debt field treated as pending)
AC22: Unsupported override → unsupported_override skip + named v1 set
AC23: Hook-wiring self-probe (PM2 fix) — abort to hook_not_wired if hook unwired in user settings
AC24: Stale-state recovery (PM4 fix) — reset status:running from prior session_id
failure_modes: Test runner takes >5min → Bash timeout → test-infrastructure-broken
Output >500 KB → truncate to last 500KB with marker
Hook blocks legitimate cmd → SAIL_DISABLED_HOOKS escape; clear error msg
Hook does not fire on subagent Bash → WU12 empirical gate verifies; halt blueprint if regressed
Settings cache → users restart Claude Code session after install (accepted, called out in install msg)
PM2 (install doesn't auto-merge hook into user settings) → AC23 self-probe + WU14 install detection
PM4 (Ctrl-C mid-run leaves status:running stale) → AC24 stale-state recovery on next entry
Pytest exit 0 but tests failed → false-pass textual scan
Runner binary missing → command -v precheck + runner_binary_missing skip
User sets v2-runner override → unsupported_override skip + v1 set named
Project has both pytest config + test.sh → SAIL_PRISM_TEST_RUNNER override or polyglot_ambiguous_no_override skip
Hostile test code in unaudited repos → SAIL_PRISM_RUN_TESTS=0 opt-out (accepted v1 limitation)

critical.finding: CF-1 'containment is theater' — dissolved + polished via threat-model reframe (containment → scope guardrail)
H1 'first Bash-using premise false' — dissolved via Preservation Contract correction

high.finding: CF-2 'token budget hand-waved' — polished: single 2K bound, AC15 measurable via fixture, WU1 prompt cap explicit
CF-3 'runner exit-code interpretation wrong' — polished: per-runner exit-code section, pytest codes corrected, multi-format false-pass detection
CF-4 'liveness wishful' — polished: Bash-tool built-in timeout, explicit timeout-parameter on every invocation, partial-output handling
CF-5 'detection wrong' — polished: 2-runner check, binary-missing handling, SAIL_PRISM_TEST_RUNNER constrained with unsupported_override

medium.finding: C7 silent failures — polished: multi-format false-pass scan
M1 migration path — partial: section added, abandoned-mid-run case deferred to v2

low.finding: C1 metacharacter bypass — dropped to low under threat-model reframe

premortem_digest.top_failure: PM2: install.sh doesn't auto-merge hook into user settings; agent dispatches without scope guardrail
contributing_factors: PM4: Ctrl-C leaves status:running stale; next run reads stale findings
Settings cache requires session restart after install

work_units.desc: Create agents/test-debt-classifier.md (5-category classifier; allowlist; per-runner exit-code table; 2K-token cap; multi-class tiebreak; zero-failures; timeout-parameter required; partial-output on timeout; textual false-pass scan)
Create hooks/prism-bash-allowlist.sh (substring-prefix match; case-statement on agent_type; scope-guardrail framing; fail-open)
Implement test runner detection in prism.md (2-runner check; command -v precheck; SAIL_PRISM_TEST_RUNNER validation)
Wire Stage 5.5 (conditional dispatch + AC23 self-probe + AC24 stale-state recovery + raw-output persistence + default-construct)
Update Synthesis stage — consume test-debt findings as themable contributor; surface skip-reason from closed enum
Update prism wizard state schema — add test_debt step; document closed skip_reason enum
Update settings-example.json — add prism-bash-allowlist.sh to PreToolUse Bash matcher
Update test.sh — Cat 3-8 cover new files + behavioral evals
Add behavioral eval fixtures (7 cases: allowed, blocked, main-session, different-agent, binary-missing, false-pass textual, unsupported_override)
Refresh metadata (install.sh / README.md / agents/README.md / .claude/CLAUDE.md count updates) — see spec-drift discoveries in execution log
Pre-impl empirical gate — verify the NEW prism-bash-allowlist.sh hook fires for actual test-debt-classifier subagent dispatch (distinct from AC10)
Create test fixture tests/fixtures/test-debt-100-failures/ — 100 synthetic failing tests + generate.sh (verifies AC11 word-count proxy)
User-facing threat-model docs (Security & Side Effects subsection) + install.sh detection (warn if hook unwired in user settings)

decisions.reason: Defense-in-depth pattern; smaller blast radius; secret-scanner + dangerous-commands coexistence precedent

decisions.chosen: Scope guardrail (catches agent confusion via visible error)
decisions.reason: Threat-model reframe per feedback_threat_model_first_party_tooling memory; first-party tooling on user's own code has no adversary
AC15 verifies via fixture; agent prompt enforces; settles rev1 1K-vs-3K contradiction
Architecturally simpler; subagent return naturally surfaces timeout; replaces wishful heartbeat from rev1
Trim per /overcomplicated; v2 deferred for bun/cargo/go/npm/jest

decisions.chosen: Closed enum (no_runner_detected, opt_out_env_var, runner_binary_missing, polyglot_ambiguous_no_override, unsupported_override, hook_not_wired)
decisions.reason: Prevents implementation invention; AC18 verifies specific message per value

last_regression.reason: Stage 3 critique returned REWORK with 4 critical compound findings (CF-1 through CF-5) and load-bearing solo H1 — most severe was CF-1 (containment-is-theater) requiring threat-model reframe + Preservation Contract correction. Rev2 spec re-grounded; rev2-polish + rev3 trim followed inline.
